MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
